notes: Default dialect coverage is measured by executable regression cases that use PostgreSQL-compatible SQL. Official syntax coverage is tracked in postgresql_official_syntax_coverage.csv.
MySQL coverage is measured by executable dialect cases. Official syntax coverage is tracked in mysql_official_syntax_coverage.csv.
Oracle coverage is measured by executable dialect cases. Official syntax coverage is tracked in oracle_official_syntax_coverage.csv.
SQL Server coverage is measured by executable dialect cases. Official syntax coverage is tracked in sqlserver_official_syntax_coverage.csv.
Dameng coverage is measured by executable dialect cases. Official syntax coverage is tracked in dameng_official_syntax_coverage.csv.
